nodes.context: General term for organized criminal groups of ethnic Azerbaijanis, active in Russia, former Soviet states, Turkey, Netherlands, Germany, and other European countries. Engaged in drug trafficking, arms trafficking, fraud, money laundering, etc.
Organized crime groups among ethnic Russians, active in Russia and abroad.
Organized crime groups among ethnic Chechens, active in Russia and abroad.
Organized crime groups among ethnic Armenians, active in Russia and abroad.
Organized crime groups among ethnic Turks, active in Turkey and abroad.
Organized crime groups among ethnic Pakistanis, active in Pakistan and abroad.

edges.context: The Azerbaijani mafia is allied with the Turkish mafia.
The Azerbaijani mafia is allied with the Pakistani mafia.
The Azerbaijani mafia is allied with the Russian mafia.
The Azerbaijani mafia is allied with the Chechen mafia.
The Azerbaijani mafia is a rival of the Armenian mafia.
